ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.DeveloperName ='Churn_Protection', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User - API Only', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can’t edit the request after submission. Contact the BA team if you need changes.
